_comment: Illustrative output. Actual LLM output will vary.

digest.headline_insight: The cost of reasoning-grade AI dropped ~40% this week — workflows that were too expensive to run in production 3 months ago are now worth revisiting.

signals_analysed.title: OpenAI o3-mini
signals_analysed.so_what: We should test o3-mini for our classification and data validation nodes — 40% cost reduction at comparable quality could halve our monthly AI spend.

signals_analysed.title: Constitutional AI v2
signals_analysed.so_what: Research-stage. Monitor for practical applications in 6-12 months.

signals_analysed.title: Vercel AI SDK 4.0
signals_analysed.so_what: If we have a Next.js frontend with AI features, this simplifies streaming. Evaluate for our onboarding AI assistant.

signals_analysed.title: DuckDB + Parquet HN thread
signals_analysed.so_what: Strong community signal that DuckDB is production-ready for analytics under 100GB. Relevant to how we could simplify our data pipeline for internal reporting.

signals_analysed.title: Gemini 2.5 Pro 2M context
signals_analysed.so_what: 2M token context could enable whole-codebase analysis. Monitor for pricing drops before adopting.

signals_analysed.title: GitHub Copilot multi-file editing
signals_analysed.so_what: Engineering productivity tool, not product-relevant. Inform engineering team.

signals_analysed.title: Ray 3.0
signals_analysed.so_what: Relevant if we train ML models at scale. Currently not in our use case.

watch_list: o3-mini pricing stability over next 4 weeks

actions_to_consider.action: Run cost benchmark: o3-mini vs current model on our classification workflow
DuckDB spike: evaluate replacing internal reporting pipeline

what_we_dont_know: Whether o3-mini quality holds for our specific classification tasks
DuckDB performance at our exact data volume
Gemini 2.5 Pro reliability in production workloads
